overall.description: Cinematic game engine footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a rainy night scene at a circular intersection in Night City. The camera slowly orbits a distinctive neon-lit pagoda building while flying cars navigate the wet, reflective streets below, surrounded by towering futuristic skyscrapers and bathed in green and red neon light.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated view of circular intersection with central pagoda structure

events.description: flying vehicle passes through the intersection from right to left below the camera

agents.ego_description: slowly circling the elevated position overlooking the neon-lit intersection and central plaza

notable_agents.action: flying car navigating the circular road with headlights illuminating the wet asphalt

entered.detail: multi-tiered circular structure with red neon trim and traditional Asian architectural elements
curved elevated roadway with yellow striped barriers and concrete supports
large digital billboard displaying a woman's face with pink neon lighting
rain-slicked asphalt roads with green neon reflections and white lane markings
tall futuristic residential towers with illuminated windows and neon accents

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with an elevated view of a futuristic circular intersection dominated by a neon-lit pagoda building at its center. The camera slowly moves along a curved path, revealing an elevated highway ramp on the left and flying cars navigating the wet, reflective streets below. The atmosphere is thick with rain and neon glow, characteristic of Night City's cyberpunk aesthetic.

scene_state.functional_zone: opposite side of circular plaza showing street-level commercial entrances

events.description: multiple flying vehicles converge at the intersection and navigate around the central plaza

agents.ego_description: continuing to circle the plaza, revealing ground-level storefronts and entrances of the central building

notable_agents.action: flying car hovering near the pagoda entrance before accelerating along the circular road

entered.detail: ground floor commercial spaces with illuminated signage and awnings around the pagoda base

segments.scene_description: Having moved to the opposite side of the circular plaza, the camera now reveals the street-level commercial entrances of the central pagoda building. The elevated highway and distant billboard have passed out of view, replaced by closer views of storefronts and the right-side skyline. Flying vehicles continue to navigate the intersection, their lights reflecting off the rain-slicked roads.

scene_state.functional_zone: returning to initial side of intersection with elevated highway visible again

events.description: flying car passes close to camera position from left to right at high speed

agents.ego_description: completing the circular path around the plaza as the elevated highway comes back into view

notable_agents.action: flying car ascending from street level near the elevated ramp

entered.detail: curved elevated roadway with yellow striped barriers returning to view
large digital billboard with pink neon lighting visible again on the left

segments.scene_description: The camera completes its circuit around the circular intersection, with the elevated highway ramp and distant neon billboard re-entering the frame from the left. The street-level shops of the pagoda pass behind as the perspective returns to the initial vantage point. Flying vehicles continue to traverse the wet roads, maintaining the steady flow of traffic through the neon-drenched Night City plaza.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous orbital camera movement around a neon-lit pagoda building, transitioning from a wide aerial perspective of a circular intersection back to its original vantage point. It begins with an elevated view of the plaza, gliding along a curved path that reveals an elevated highway ramp and flying cars navigating the rain-slicked streets below. As the camera reaches the opposite side of the circle, the highway and distant billboards fade from view, shifting the focus toward the street-level commercial entrances and storefronts of the central pagoda. The scene then completes its circuit as the perspective swings back, bringing the elevated ramp and neon billboards back into frame from the left. Finally, the camera returns to its starting position, maintaining a steady gaze over the flow of futuristic traffic within the neon-drenched plaza.
